TestCase z4Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_data = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_data, t1.data, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.data = follow_case_data;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element to process
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Specific operation: divide each element by 2.0 (denominator is non‑zero)
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        follow_case.data[i] = follow_case.data[i] / 2.0;
    }

    return follow_case;
}
